schema.name: glob
schema.description: Finds files matching a glob pattern under the NDX virtual root. Prefer project-relative paths like apps/... for project directories; never write them as /apps/....

path.description: Directory to search in. Defaults to the project root. Prefer project-relative paths; absolute paths must stay under the NDX virtual root.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. Defaults to 100.
